why: Next-generation FLUX family; strong candidate for high-quality photoreal generation, structured prompt following, editing, and multi-reference identity workflows.
implementation_requirement: Create dedicated Flux2 workflow templates and object_info/runtime proof before any production promotion.

why: Designed for faster Flux2 text-to-image and image-editing workflows; useful for local preview/proxy before expensive renders.
implementation_requirement: Add as preview tier, not final hero tier until A/B tested against Flux2 dev and SDXL/RealVisXL.

why: Useful for benchmark/comparison, typography, or high-quality reference if user accepts API cost/latency and non-local workflow.
implementation_requirement: Do not make it a core local dependency; route behind optional API config and cost gate.

why: Existing Flux-family support and useful as stable fallback/smoke/proxy lanes.
implementation_requirement: Separate Flux1 from Flux2 assets and LoRAs.

why: Strong Civitai LoRA ecosystem and existing runtime lanes make SDXL/RealVisXL the best detail/refine/specialty pass layer.
implementation_requirement: Keep same-engine LoRA rules; use image bridges from Flux/Flux2 outputs.

checkpoint_or_engine: Pony Diffusion V6 XL / Pony-compatible variants
why: Useful where a Pony-specific model handles a concept better, but should not replace the primary photoreal base without visual proof.
implementation_requirement: Treat as separate Pony-SDXL family; no blind SDXL/Pony mixing.

why: Useful only for legacy assets or very specific models; not a primary hyperreal engine.
implementation_requirement: Bridge by image only and isolate from SDXL/Flux/Pony models.

why: Current main flow already includes a Z-Image lane; useful for fast tests if quality/cost profile is favorable.
implementation_requirement: Do not promote as final photoreal lane until comparative QA beats existing lanes.

why: Strong candidate for text rendering, instruction following, editing, and composition-heavy images.
implementation_requirement: Add only after ComfyUI workflow proof and model asset placement are verified.

why: Potential comparison engine for typography, complex prompts, and MMDiT-based generation.
implementation_requirement: Separate SD3.5 asset family; do not assume SDXL LoRA compatibility.

why: Open advanced video model family with text/image/video routing potential.
implementation_requirement: Use shot-level video QA, not still-image QA only.

why: Lightweight video model candidate for lower VRAM/cost routes.
implementation_requirement: Benchmark temporal coherence and identity drift against Wan2.2.

why: Audio-video foundation model candidate for synchronized AV experiments.
implementation_requirement: Keep separate audio QA gates for clipping, timing, spatial placement, and timeline alignment.

why: Models without metadata, hash, family, license/source, Civitai model/version ID, and QA proof cause broken routing and bad stacks.
implementation_requirement: Force through Wave02 Civitai metadata ingestion and Wave06 compatibility validation first.
